social_profiles.bio: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd. is India’s market leader in fans, number one player in residential pumps and has leading market positions in its other product categories. The company manufactures and markets a wide spectrum of consumer products, ranging from fans, lamps and luminaires, to pumps and household appliances such as water heaters, Kitchen appliances etc.  Crompton has a strong dealer base across the country and a wide service network that offers robust after sales service to its consumers.

posts.caption:
A step-by-step installation and setup guide that walks you through the entire process so you can get started without any hassle. Designed for convenience and efficiency, the system enables you to manage your water supply effortlessly, right at your fingertips.

Equipped with advanced features like wireless connectivity, mobile app control, and intelligent water level management, the Intellisense Smart Pro ensures smooth and automated operation. Whether you’re setting it up for the first time or looking to understand its full potential, this guide helps you make the most of a smarter, more efficient water management solution.
Precision on the field. Performance at home. Crompton Fluido Wave Fans with ActivBLDC technology

Upgrade to smarter, stress-free water management with the Intellisense Smart Pro Control Panel. Designed for modern homes, this IoT-enabled solution lets you effortlessly operate and monitor your water system through a mobile app, bringing convenience right to your fingertips. The intelligent main controller automatically manages pump operations, while the autofill feature senses overhead tank water levels and ensures it’s always filled when needed, ensuring no more manual checks or overflows.

With scheduled and timer-based operations, you can customise water usage to fit your daily routine. Built with advanced safety features like voltage fluctuation protection and dry run protection, the system safeguards your pump by automatically shutting it off when the underground tank runs empty. Its strong wireless communication capability works seamlessly across up to 7 floors, making it ideal for multi-storey homes.

Perfect for domestic households, the Intellisense Smart Pro Control Panel also comes with free installation support for a hassle-free setup, along with a 12-month warranty and an additional 6-month extended warranty for complete peace of mind.
